changes: Outdoor closed-building roof full-like budget: detects areaRatio/top-half full bounds even without explicit v149Fallback.
Budget steps: baseline 4x3, governor budget 5x4, emergency 6x5.
Self-depth write covers the budgeted block size to avoid gable/cap overlap artifacts.
Indoor modern cover ceiling/soffit color now derives from roof palette, darkened and V106-fogged; no grey hardcoded panel.
Footstep and bird volumes increased considerably while preserving V196 cadence/sparse timing.
